name: Apple Nut Squares
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Apples; unpeeled, cored, and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until foamy. Add sugar gradually, continuing to beat until the mixture is thick and lemon-colored.
2. Add vanilla. Mix flour, salt, and baking powder separately.
3. Blend the dry ingredients into the egg mixture.
4. Fold in apples and walnuts.
5. Turn the batter into a greased and floured 13X9-inch pan.
6. Bake for 30-40 minutes at 350°F until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cut into squares. Serve warm or cold as a bar cookie or with whipped cream as a dessert.
